reload-sftp-file.description: 根据结果设置表单路径

initAction.description: 注册 webshell 标签输出状态监听
initAction.method: ${(()=>{const w=window;if(!w.__webshellTabStatus){const state={timers:{},status:{},resizeUntil:{},lastText:{},layoutUntil:0,dragging:false};const tabButton=(key)=>[...w.document.querySelectorAll('.ant-tabs-tab-btn,[role="tab"]')].find(el=>{const id=String(el.id||'');const controls=String(el.getAttribute('aria-controls')||'');const nodeKey=String(el.getAttribute('data-node-key')||'');return nodeKey===key||id.endsWith('-tab-'+key)||controls.endsWith('-panel-'+key)||id.indexOf(key)>=0||controls.indexOf(key)>=0;});const ensureDot=(key)=>{if(!w.document){return [];}const btn=tabButton(key);if(!btn){return [];}let dot=[...btn.querySelectorAll('.webshell-tab-status-dot')].find(el=>String(el.getAttribute('data-webshell-status-token')||'')===key);if(!dot){dot=w.document.createElement('span');dot.className='webshell-tab-status-dot is-stopped';dot.setAttribute('data-webshell-status-token',key);dot.setAttribute('title','已停止或暂无输出');btn.insertBefore(dot,btn.firstChild);}return [dot];};const paint=(token,active)=>{const key=String(token||'');if(!key||!w.document){return;}state.status[key]=active?'active':'stopped';const nodes=[...new Set([...ensureDot(key),...[...w.document.querySelectorAll('.webshell-tab-status-dot')].filter(el=>String(el.getAttribute('data-webshell-status-token')||'')===key)])];nodes.forEach(el=>{el.classList.toggle('is-active',!!active);el.classList.toggle('is-stopped',!active);el.setAttribute('title',active?'运行中，有输出':'已停止或暂无输出');});};const mark=(token,active)=>{const key=String(token||'');if(!key){return;}if(state.timers[key]){w.clearTimeout(state.timers[key]);}paint(key,!!active);if(active){state.timers[key]=w.setTimeout(()=>paint(key,false),1800);}};state.mark=mark;state.paintAll=()=>{Object.keys(state.status).forEach(key=>paint(key,state.status[key]==='active'));};const matchToken=(url)=>{const m=String(url||'').match(/\/template_data\/ws\/([^/?#]+)/);return m?m[1]:'';};const suppress=(token,ms)=>{const key=String(token||'');if(!key){return;}state.resizeUntil[key]=Date.now()+ms;if(state.timers[key]){w.clearTimeout(state.timers[key]);}paint(key,false);};state.suppress=suppress;const payloadType=(raw)=>{if(typeof raw!=='string'){return '';}try{const msg=JSON.parse(raw);return msg&&msg.type?String(msg.type):'';}catch(e){return '';}};const shouldSuppress=(token)=>{const key=String(token||'');const now=Date.now();return now<state.layoutUntil||(key&&now<(state.resizeUntil[key]||0));};const clean=(value)=>String(value||'').replace(/\u001b\][^\u0007]*(?:\u0007|\u001b\\)/g,'').replace(/\u001b\[[0-?]*[ -/]*[@-~]/g,'').replace(/\u001b[ -/]*[@-~]/g,'').replace(/[\x00-\x1f\x7f]/g,'').trim();const isOutput=(raw,token)=>{if(shouldSuppress(token)){return false;}const text=typeof raw==='string'?raw:'';if(!text||text.indexOf('<<<PWD_START>>>')>=0||text.indexOf('<<<PWD_END>>>')>=0){return false;}try{const msg=JSON.parse(text);if(msg&&msg.type&&String(msg.type)!=='text'){return false;}if(msg&&String(msg.type)==='text'){return !!clean(msg.data);}}catch(e){}return !!clean(text);};const Native=w.WebSocket;const Wrapped=function(url,protocols){const ws=protocols!==undefined?new Native(url,protocols):new Native(url);const token=matchToken(url);if(token){const rawSend=ws.send;ws.send=function(data){const type=payloadType(data);if(type==='text'){state.lastText[token]=Date.now();}else if(type==='resize'&&Date.now()-(state.lastText[token]||0)>1200){suppress(token,1800);}return rawSend.apply(ws,arguments);};ws.addEventListener('open',()=>paint(token,false));ws.addEventListener('message',ev=>{if(isOutput(ev.data,token)){mark(token,true);}});ws.addEventListener('close',()=>mark(token,false));ws.addEventListener('error',()=>mark(token,false));}return ws;};try{Wrapped.prototype=Native.prototype;Object.setPrototypeOf(Wrapped,Native);w.WebSocket=Wrapped;}catch(e){}const isResizeHandle=(el)=>{try{return !!(el&&el.closest&&el.closest('.webshell-container .panel-resize,.webshell-container .co-ui-panel-resize,.webshell-container .Resizer'));}catch(e){return false;}};const bumpLayout=()=>{state.layoutUntil=Date.now()+1800;Object.keys(state.status).forEach(key=>mark(key,false));};if(w.document){w.document.addEventListener('pointerdown',ev=>{if(isResizeHandle(ev.target)){state.dragging=true;bumpLayout();}},true);w.document.addEventListener('pointermove',()=>{if(state.dragging){bumpLayout();}},true);w.document.addEventListener('pointerup',()=>{if(state.dragging){state.dragging=false;bumpLayout();}},true);w.document.addEventListener('pointercancel',()=>{if(state.dragging){state.dragging=false;bumpLayout();}},true);}const observe=()=>{if(state.observer||!w.document||!w.document.body||!w.MutationObserver){return;}const obs=new w.MutationObserver(()=>state.paintAll());obs.observe(w.document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true});state.observer=obs;};observe();if(!state.observer&&w.document){w.document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',observe,{once:true});}w.__webshellTabStatus=state;}return true;})()}

initAction.description: 注册 webshell 终端底部固定监听
initAction.method: ${(()=>{const w=window;const version='20260519-layout-only';if(!w.__webshellTerminalPinBottom||w.__webshellTerminalPinBottom.version!==version){const state={version,timers:[],resizeObserver:null,mutationObserver:null,watched:new Set(),viewportCount:0};const scroll=()=>{try{if(!w.document){return false;}[...w.document.querySelectorAll('.webshell-container .xterm-viewport')].forEach(el=>{el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;});return true;}catch(e){return false;}};const schedule=()=>{state.timers.forEach(t=>w.clearTimeout(t));state.timers=[];const run=()=>{scroll();if(w.requestAnimationFrame){w.requestAnimationFrame(scroll);}};[0,50,160,320].forEach(ms=>state.timers.push(w.setTimeout(run,ms)));};const watch=el=>{if(!el||state.watched.has(el)){return;}state.watched.add(el);try{state.resizeObserver&&state.resizeObserver.observe(el);}catch(e){}};const observe=()=>{if(!w.document||!w.document.body){return;}if(!state.resizeObserver&&w.ResizeObserver){state.resizeObserver=new w.ResizeObserver(()=>schedule());}const viewports=[...w.document.querySelectorAll('.webshell-container .xterm-viewport')];[...w.document.querySelectorAll('.webshell-container,.webshell-container .xterm,.webshell-container .xterm-viewport')].forEach(watch);const nextCount=viewports.length;if(nextCount>state.viewportCount){schedule();}state.viewportCount=nextCount;if(!state.mutationObserver&&w.MutationObserver){state.mutationObserver=new w.MutationObserver(()=>observe());state.mutationObserver.observe(w.document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true});}};state.scroll=scroll;state.schedule=schedule;state.observe=observe;const onResize=()=>schedule();state.destroy=()=>{state.timers.forEach(t=>w.clearTimeout(t));state.timers=[];try{state.resizeObserver&&state.resizeObserver.disconnect();}catch(e){}try{state.mutationObserver&&state.mutationObserver.disconnect();}catch(e){}w.removeEventListener('resize',onResize);};w.addEventListener('resize',onResize,{passive:true});if(w.document&&w.document.readyState==='loading'){w.document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{observe();schedule();},{once:true});}else{observe();schedule();}w.__webshellTerminalPinBottom=state;}else{w.__webshellTerminalPinBottom.observe&&w.__webshellTerminalPinBottom.observe();w.__webshellTerminalPinBottom.schedule&&w.__webshellTerminalPinBottom.schedule();}return true;})()}
